title: 5mm Jute Twine,50M/164 Feet Strong Jute Rope,Twisted Thick Jute Twine String,for Wall Paintings,Chandeliers,DIY Cat Scratcher,Staircase Handrails,Artistic Wall Hanging Ropes, Handicrafts Cord
features: 【High Quality Material】 Natural rope 5mm is made of high-quality hemp, with a diameter of 5mm, which is flexible. Compared with traditional hemp rope, it can hold objects tighter.

【Diameter 5mm】The jute rope has a diameter of 5mm/0.2 inches and a length of 50m/164 feet,wrap it on the legs of furniture,staircase handrails,DIY cat scratcher,wall decoration and other handicraft decoration items.
【Easy to Use】- The thick jute rope is packed into rolls and will not be entangled with each other. It can be cut to any length as needed.
【Great Garden Helper】This natural jute twine is perfect for gardening application,like holding tomatoes,cucumbers and other veggies,or string things up outside in garden.

【Widely Used】- The jute hemp rope can be used for indoor gardening strapping, craft decoration,can also be used to cat scratching boards,give your cute cat a happy time.And other artistic decorations,such as:wall paintings,chandeliers,staircase handrails, artistic wall hanging ropes, etc.
description: Product Description Hemp rope decoration-let art come into life and enjoy a leisurely time! Thick jute twine string diameter: 5mm thickness, flexible and durable, uniform thickness, pure color, multi-strand twine rope weaving is more textured, and the twine rope is stronger It is woven with multiple strands of hemp rope, which is more durable than ordinary hemp rope, will not loose and fluff with scissors, and is resistant to wear 50M/164Feet is long enough to meet your daily use.Packed in rolls, convenient storage and not easy to be scattered. Decorative bottles Gift wrapping Hanging items Thick jute twine string diameter: 5mm thickness, flexible and durable, uniform thickness, pure color, multi-strand twine rope weaving is more textured, and the twine rope is stronger. There are a variety of creative collocations, such as winding cat scratcher, water pipe rack lanyard, kettle handle, staircase handrail, chandelier decoration, pendant flower pot and home decoration, etc. Warm Notes: 1.To avoid being unraveled, please kindly tape the end of twine or make a knot after cutting it. 2.All natural jute has a weird smell, but it will be distributed in the air. Specification of Natural Jute Twine: Material:Natural Jute Quantity:1 Pcs 50m Jute Rope Color:Brown Diameter:5mm/0.2inch Length:164 Feet/50 M Bundled Size: 10×20cm/3.94×7.87inch Weight:550g/19.4oz Package Included: 1 x 5mm Twisted Jute Rope
